response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Systemic deficit deadlock requires preserving all available reserves for self-sufficiency; broadcasting inbound requests instead of depleting local SoC further.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r3c4. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.28 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.25, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Systemic islanded cluster deficit deadlock. All peers requesting; none supplying. r2c4 SoC 29.6% and declining. Autonomy ~11 hrs at 1.0 kW load. Minimize outbound to preserve self-sufficiency runway. Broadcast urgent inbound requests. Load-shedding to 0.5 kW or grid reconnection required within 6–8 hours if no surplus peers emerge..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
